meta.title: MyAppFactory — Your custom app factory
meta.description: AI-native applications, built for you, shipped fast. Reusable packs and AI customization for SMBs going digital.

hero.title: Your custom
hero.subtitle: Not an AI subscription. Not classic dev. An architecture built from scratch, on battle-tested blocks.

stats.aiLabel: by default, not as an option

problem.title: Today's solutions don't cut it anymore.
problem.subtitle: Three dead ends slowing down your SMB's digital shift.

generic.title: Generic SaaS
generic.body: They cover 60% of your needs. The remaining 40% — your business, your workflows — stays stuck in spreadsheets.

custom.title: Classic development
custom.body: Six months to ship an MVP. Three years of technical debt. A budget that doubles for unclear reasons.

ai.title: Bolted-on AI
ai.body: A chatbot pasted on your site isn't AI-native. Bolted on, AI saves you 10% of time. At the architectural core, it multiplies your capacity.

approach.title: The Factory: reusable packs + AI customization.
approach.subtitle: We don't write every app from a blank page. We assemble industrial modules — auth, payment, dashboards, AI agents — and tune them to your business.

modular.title: Battle-tested blocks
modular.body: A library of modules already proven in production. Auth, payment, CRM, dashboards, AI agents — assembled, not rewritten.

aiNative.title: AI-native, not patched
aiNative.body: AI is built in at the architecture level, not bolted on at the end. Agents, semantic search, automation — native by design.

ownership.title: You stay in control
ownership.body: No golden cage. The source code is yours, deployment stays under your control. No lock-in.

build.title: Six application families. One method.
build.subtitle: Each category builds on ready-to-deploy packs.

web.title: Web apps
web.body: SaaS, dashboards, customer portals, B2B platforms.

mobile.title: Mobile apps
mobile.body: iOS and Android, native or hybrid as needed.

ai.title: AI agents
ai.body: Specialized assistants, business copilots, RAG on your data.

apps.title: Already in production.
apps.subtitle: Three apps built with the Factory. Three different industries. One method.

harold.name: Tell-E/HaRold
harold.description: AI-augmented recruitment workspace to score, organize and accelerate sourcing.

telle.name: SaLLy
telle.description: Virtual personal shopper that turns e-commerce visitors into buyers with AI-driven personalized recommendations.

leo.name: LeO
leo.description: AI lead generation tool to identify, qualify and prioritize prospects at scale.

process.title: Four steps. Six weeks on average.
process.subtitle: An iterative, transparent process. No nasty surprises.

discovery.title: Discovery
discovery.body: We understand your business, your constraints, your goal. You leave with an honest opinion, even if we don't work together.

selection.title: Blueprint
selection.body: We map your current state: flows, costs, bottlenecks. Then we build an AI opportunity matrix — feasibility × impact. We pick the right modules to mobilize.

customization.title: AI customization
customization.body: We assemble, customize, train models on your data. You follow progress in real time.

delivery.title: Delivery & ownership
delivery.body: Source code is yours, secure deployment, team training. Optional ongoing support.

forWho.title: Built for teams that need to move fast.

pme.title: SMBs going digital
pme.body: You've spotted a business bottleneck. Excel and generic SaaS aren't enough anymore.

startup.title: Startups & scale-ups
startup.body: You need to ship an MVP in weeks. Without mortgaging the future with massive technical debt.

internal.title: Teams without devs
internal.body: You have the business expertise but no technical resources. We become your outsourced engineering team.

training.title: Three levels to move from usage to mastery.
training.subtitle: MyAppFactory trains your teams to understand, automate and operate AI in their own workflows — with practical workshops, not abstract theory.
training.academyTitle: Training as an accelerator for your AI-native projects.
training.academyBody: Start by upskilling your team, extend with a Blueprint, or combine Build + Training to deliver the tool and the adoption plan together.
training.outcomesTitle: By the end, your teams know where AI truly creates value.

outcomes.outcome1: A clear view of the AI use cases that matter for your business.
outcomes.outcome2: Prompts, workflows or prototypes reusable the next day.
outcomes.outcome3: A method to frame risks, data and ROI.

level1.label: Level 1 · Beginner
level1.title: AI Essentials
level1.body: Understand generative AI, use the right tools and save time on daily tasks: emails, documents, meetings, research and synthesis.
level1.audience: Leaders, business teams and non-technical profiles.
level1.result: Individual autonomy and a business prompt library.

level2.label: Level 2 · Intermediate
level2.title: AI Workflow
level2.body: Turn repetitive tasks into AI workflows: forms, documents, CRM, Google Sheets, Notion, Airtable, n8n, Make or Zapier.
level2.audience: Operations, sales, marketing, HR, admin teams and consultants.
level2.result: One concrete workflow and an AI opportunity matrix.

level3.label: Level 3 · Pro
level3.title: AI-native Pro
level3.body: Design integrated AI systems: specialized agents, RAG on your data, API integrations, evaluation, security, deployment and monitoring.
level3.audience: Advanced profiles, AI consultants, product managers, CTOs, tech/no-code teams.
level3.result: A target architecture or prototype ready to industrialize.

cta.title: Ready for takeoff?
cta.subtitle: 30 minutes. No commitment. We'll honestly tell you what we can build — or what we can't.

form.challengePlaceholder: What problem do you want to solve with AI?

meta.title: AI OS — Your private AI, turnkey · MyAppFactory
meta.description: A private AI operating system for your business: a single cockpit that orchestrates intelligent agents in the cloud, on your machines and inside your custom applications. Private, scalable, reversible.

hero.title: Your private AI, turnkey.
hero.definition: AI OS, short for <g>AI Operating System</g> — just as Windows runs your computer, the AI OS runs and coordinates all of your company's AI.
hero.subtitle: Not one more subscription. Not a chatbot. A real <k>AI operating system</k>, yours — a single cockpit that orchestrates intelligent agents in the cloud, on your machines and inside your custom applications.
hero.subtitle2: Not ChatGPT bolted onto your day. Not ten automations that break the moment you look away. An architecture built for you: private, scalable, reversible.
hero.live: Already in production — on our own company.

problem.title: AI in business today means three dead ends.

silos.title: Scattered
silos.body: A ChatGPT subscription, an "AI" SaaS here, a plugin there. No shared memory, no consistency, and your data spread across ten vendors.

chatbot.title: Talks, but doesn't act
chatbot.body: Impressive in a demo, disconnected from your tools, your files and your machines. It answers questions; it doesn't do the work.

diy.title: That collapses
diy.body: Zapier, Make, homemade scripts piled up. It holds as long as nobody touches it. Then it breaks — and no one knows how to fix it.

proposition.title: One cockpit. All your AI. Under your control.
proposition.lead: The AI OS is a single command point — your phone (Telegram, WhatsApp) or a secure web dashboard — that drives a team of AI agents. They understand your requests in plain language and <k>actually act</k>: on your servers, on your PCs, inside your applications and your business data.

blocks.title: Battle-tested blocks
blocks.body: Robust open-source components — agents, orchestration, private network — assembled and hardened. Not a throwaway prototype.

native.title: AI-native, not bolted on
native.body: Designed around AI from the first line, integrated with your tools. Not an assistant glued on afterwards.

control.title: You stay in control
control.body: Hosted on your side, reversible, with no locked-in dependency. Code, data, access: you own it.

architecture.title: Six blocks. A system that holds.
architecture.lead: Each piece has a clear role. Together they form a continuous chain: from your message to the concrete action, in the cloud as on your desktop.

cockpit.title: AI COCKPIT — Hermes "Albert"
cockpit.sub: understands · decides · replies — your single entry point

paperclip.title: PAPERCLIP — the orchestrator
paperclip.sub: composes & coordinates a team of agents working in parallel

apps.title: Your custom apps
apps.sub: LeO · SaLLy · HaRold · … and the next ones

cockpit.title: The cockpit
cockpit.body: A conductor agent, reachable from Telegram, WhatsApp or a secure web dashboard. It understands your requests, decides what to do and triggers the right actions. Your single point of contact, day and night.

workforce.title: The AI workforce
workforce.body: For heavy or parallel tasks, a "company" of specialized agents splits the work and coordinates — like a team you mobilize on demand, then pause. Power when you need it, not a bill running non-stop.

cloud.title: The cloud infrastructure
cloud.body: A private server, always on, secured over HTTPS, hosting your agents, your databases and your services. The engine room — yours, not that of a vendor who can change the rules overnight.

network.title: The private network
network.body: An encrypted mesh links the cloud to your PCs and laptops. The agent can <k>act on your machines</k> — for example open the right report in your browser, remotely — without ever exposing anything to the public Internet.

apps.title: Your connected applications
apps.body: Your custom tools — CRM, sales agent, candidate database, dashboards — plugged into the AI, for reading and acting. The agent queries your business data and evolves it, staying within your perimeter.

skills.title: Your custom skills
skills.body: Capabilities added à la carte: "open that report", "where is that client", "run that analysis". We add them as we go, without rebuilding everything. Your AI OS learns your business, not the other way around.

proof.title: We don't sell you a concept. We show you ours.
proof.lead: Before being an offer, the AI OS is our daily life. MyAppFactory is run from a phone — here are real requests, and what happens next.

open.q: "Open the ULB recon report on my PC"
open.a: The right file opens in Chrome, <g>on the right machine, remotely</g>, in two seconds. Several versions? The agent asks which one.

leo.a: The agent queries our sales agent, <g>reads the replies received</g> and gives you a clear summary.

dashboard.a: Access <g>secured over HTTPS</g>, wherever you are, with no port to remember or workaround.

guardrails.title: Built to last, not to lock you in.
guardrails.lead: Four non-negotiable principles — learned by building it for real, on our own company.

privacy.title: Private by default
privacy.body: Your data and your agents run on your infrastructure. Nothing travels over a public network without reason, nothing is resold. The encrypted private network links your machines without exposing them.

budget.title: Controlled costs
budget.body: The right AI model for each task — economical day-to-day, powerful when needed — with anti-overrun guardrails. No surprise bill at month's end.

scale.title: We start small
scale.body: A first use case that works, then we add blocks and skills at the pace of your needs. No big bang, no six-month project before the first result.

ownership.title: Reversible
ownership.body: Every step is documented and reversible. You keep full ownership — code, data, access. You can take back control, or hand it to whoever you want.

forWho.title: If you recognize yourself here, let's talk.

pme.title: SMBs going digital
pme.body: You want AI to take on real work — not just answer questions — without building a technical team.

leaders.title: Founders & solopreneurs
leaders.body: You're overloaded, you carry everything. You want to delegate to an assistant that truly acts, from your phone.

noDev.title: Teams without a developer
noDev.body: You have tools and data, but no one to connect them intelligently. We build the bridge — and leave it with you.

process.title: Four steps. Six weeks on average.

discovery.title: Discovery
discovery.body: Your tasks, your tools, your pain points. We map what AI can really take on.

blueprint.title: Blueprint
blueprint.body: The architecture of your AI OS, validated with you before writing a single line. No surprises.

install.title: Setup & connection
install.body: Cockpit, private cloud, secure network and your applications — assembled, hardened, tested.

delivery.title: Delivery & ownership
delivery.body: Training, access, documentation. You take control. It's your system.

finalCta.title: What if you ran your company from a conversation?
finalCta.lead: One conversation, no commitment. We look at what AI can truly take on at your company — and we tell you honestly what's worth it, and what isn't.

aiosTeaser.title: Your applications, orchestrated by
aiosTeaser.definition: AI OS, short for <g>AI Operating System</g> — just as Windows runs your computer, the AI OS runs and coordinates all of your company's AI.
aiosTeaser.subtitle: The apps you just saw don't live in silos: a private cockpit connects them and acts through them — LeO, SaLLy, HaRold and the next ones — from a single conversation.
